---
title: Using libraries and modules
format: 
    pdf: default
    ipynb: default
jupyter: python3
---

## Loading data {#sec-loading}

## pandas details {#sec-pandas}

dt.strftime("%-m/%-d/%y, %H:%M")

## numpy {#sec-numpy}

gives math.pi

import numpy as np

date and time 

statistics

scipy.stats

random

decimal

json

csv

sqlite3

pickle

datetime

time

unittest

os 

sys 

try except
